overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking along a rural dirt path through the vibrant countryside of Toussaint, with blooming orchards, vineyards, and a distant hillside village visible under bright spring sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path alongside stone wall with blooming orchard

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path beside a stone wall with terracotta roof tiles

entered.detail: low stone wall with orange terracotta roof tiles running along the right side of the path
white flowering trees lining the left side of the path on a grassy hillside
cluster of stone buildings with red roofs visible on the distant hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a rural dirt path bordered by a stone wall with terracotta tiles on the right and blooming white trees on the left. The bright spring sun illuminates the vibrant green grass and distant hillside village visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open vineyard path with mountain vista

events.description: stone wall ends and path opens into expansive vineyard countryside with mountain views
field worker becomes visible tending to the vineyard rows on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the open vineyard area toward the distant mountains

notable_agents.action: peasant worker bending over and tending to the vineyard plants on the right side of the path

entered.detail: rows of grapevines stretching along the right side of the path
blue-hued mountains visible in the far distance beyond the village

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide vineyard landscape with rows of grapevines replacing the stone wall. A field worker tends to the plants on the right as Geralt walks toward the distant mountains, with the village now visible on the left hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving path through vineyards with roadside shrine

events.description: path begins to curve gently to the left toward the hillside village
villager in yellow clothing appears standing on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the curving path, passing the field worker and approaching a villager near a wooden shrine

notable_agents.action: field worker continuing to tend vines as Geralt passes by on the path
villager wearing yellow tunic and brown pants standing on the left path edge

entered.detail: wooden cross structure with small roof alongside the path
large tree with purple-pink blossoms ahead at the path junction
stone houses with red roofs on the left hillside becoming more detailed

segments.scene_description: The path curves left past a wooden roadside shrine, with the field worker still visible on the right. A villager stands on the left side of the path as Geralt approaches a large purple-blossomed tree at a junction, with stone buildings now clearly visible on the nearby hillside.

events.description: path curves more distinctly as it approaches the junction by the large tree

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the curving path past the villager toward the junction ahead

entered.detail: dirt path intersection with grassy clearing visible to the right

segments.scene_description: Geralt rounds the curve past the villager and approaches a junction marked by the large purple-blossomed tree. The wooden shrine and field worker fall behind as the path opens toward the village outskirts with stone buildings visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural path that transitions from a narrow, flower-lined lane into an expansive vineyard landscape leading toward a hillside village. It begins with Geralt walking beside a terracotta-tiled stone wall and blooming white trees under a bright spring sun. As the path opens, the stone wall gives way to wide rows of grapevines where a field worker tends to the plants, shifting the perspective toward distant mountains and a village on the left hillside. The scene then curves past a wooden roadside shrine and a standing villager, moving toward a large purple-blossomed tree at a junction. Finally, the camera rounds the bend, leaving the worker and shrine behind as the path opens directly toward the stone buildings of the village outskirts.
